Function declaration for creating a workout glance in the launcher app.

# Purpose
This header file declares a function `launcher_app_glance_workout_create` that creates and returns a pointer to a `LauncherAppGlance` object. The function takes a constant pointer to an `AppMenuNode` as its parameter, which suggests it uses this node to configure or initialize the `LauncherAppGlance` object. The use of `#pragma once` prevents multiple inclusions of this header file in a single compilation unit.
